cloud._c_enable: 0 = clear-sky  |  1 = read cloud properties from sounding NetCDF
cloud._c_sounding_vars: sounding must contain: lwp [g/m²], iwp [g/m²], re_liq [µm], re_ice [µm], cloud_fraction [0–1]  |  set 0 for aerosol-free layers
cloud._c_iceflag: 2 = Streamer/Fu1996 (re_ice 5–131 µm)  |  3 = Fu1998 generalized D_ge (5–140 µm)
cloud._c_re_liq: µm  |  used when re_liq absent from sounding  |  typical 5–15 µm
cloud._c_re_ice: µm  |  used when re_ice absent from sounding  |  typical 20–80 µm

aerosol._c_enable: 0 = no aerosol  |  1 = read aerosol properties from sounding NetCDF
aerosol._c_sounding_vars: sounding must contain: aod [dimensionless, at 550 nm], ssa [0–1], g [−1 to 1]  |  set 0 for aerosol-free layers

vertical_grid._c_res: km  |  0.25 fine  0.5 standard  1.0 coarse  |  above 15 km always 1 km to 50 km

output._c_clearsky: true = also write lw/sw _clr variables  |  false = all-sky only
